flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Barstow Community College rose 43% between 2007 and 2010 (1.4k → 2.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Barstow Community College rose 33% between 2009 and 2010 (7.7% → 10.2%).
